DESCRIPTION: Read&Write is a comprehensive literacy support tool designed to assist with reading, writing, and comprehension. It features text-to-speech with highlighting, a dictionary and picture dictionary for vocabulary building, word prediction for writing support, and tools for highlighting and collecting notes. It also includes a PDF reader and spelling/grammar check functionalities, making digital content more accessible and manageable.
Data-Entry-Person NOTES: Individuals and students with learning differences such as dyslexia, processing disorders, or anyone seeking support for reading comprehension, writing tasks, vocabulary development, and organizing information from digital texts.

DESCRIPTION: Otter.ai is an AI-powered transcription platform that converts spoken words into written text in real-time. It offers automated note-taking, speaker identification, and transcription of audio and video files. The tool also provides AI-generated meeting summaries with action items and an AI Chat feature to interact with transcripts, reducing the cognitive burden of traditional note-taking and helping users stay focused during conversations, lectures, and meetings.
Data-Entry-Person NOTES: Students and professionals with cognitive disabilities who struggle with note-taking, auditory processing, or maintaining focus during spoken interactions, including individuals with ADHD or learning disabilities, as well as those who are deaf or hard of hearing.
Reason: Same or similar tool already exists in main database → Otter.ai (Otter); Flip Writer AAC (Navanit Arakeri); Ghotit Real Writer&Reader (Ghotit Ltd.); Attention Awareness (Apple); Per App Settings (Apple)
